calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2015 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc And Jay Franco & Sons, Inc And Index Of Exhibits
Off Calendar Jan-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. PETER SOTO of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel No. (310) 623-1926 appearing telephonically for Plaintiff Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc.;
Atty. REBECCA L. WOODSON of McKenna, Long & Aldridge, LLP, Tel No. (415) 267-4000 appearing telephonically for Defendant J. Franco & Sons, Inc.

The Court required parties to appear. Argument presented by counsel. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. and Jay Franco & Sons, Inc. is taken under submission by the Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

On 1/27/15, after having previously taken the matter under submission, the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. and Jay Franco & Sons, Inc. is GRANTED. ORDER AFTER HEARING AND CONSENT JUDGMENT SIGNED AND MAILED TO PARTIES. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH (302/EHG)
